sys_documentation.label: Create Scheduled Task(s) in Draft State

sys_documentation.help: Checking this box will make is so that the schedule creator must manually start the recurring tasks created by this Template schedule.
sys_documentation.hint: When checked, tasks started by the schedule will be created in Draft State.
sys_documentation.label: Create Scheduled Task(s) in Draft State
sys_documentation.name: x_153465_discovert_tasker_schedule
sys_documentation.plural: Create Scheduled Task(s) in Draft States
sys_documentation.sys_name: Create Scheduled Task(s) in Draft State
